name: Vermicelli W/Chunky Vegetable Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh basil or 2 tablespoons dried basil, chopped
2 tablespoons fresh oregano or 2 teaspoons dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions. Drain and transfer to a wide serving bowl.
2. In a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, heat olive oil. Add red peppers, onion, and mushrooms; cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Add zucchini and garlic; cook until zucchini is tender. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, garlic salt, sugar, lemon juice, basil, oregano, Italian seasoning, and pepper. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Cover and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
4. Serve the chunky vegetable sauce over pasta. Optionally sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
